annotations.agentregistry.googleapis.com/description: Verified Latin American data for autonomous AI agents via x402 micropayments (sanctions, KYB, rates, context).

spec.description: Sanctions screening (OFAC+UN+EU+UK, 59k+ entries), entity enrichment (RUES/CNPJ/RFC), central bank rates, business registry, AI market context. EU AI Act Art.13 compliant. x402 pay-per-call on Base/Solana, AP2-compatible.

tools.vera_sanctions: Global sanctions screening + EU AI Act audit hash
